_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for the highest-benchmark model + max reasoning effort each hub AI must use. hub-daemon.ps1 reads this to build spawn flags; activate prompts and HUB-STARTUP reference it. Refreshed daily by the model-benchmark-refresh schedule (see MODELS.md).
_meta.method: hub-upgrade-research workflow (parallel per-provider web search + adversarial cross-verify)

claude.benchmark_basis: Claude Fable 5 (2026-06-09) = Anthropic's most capable public model; exceeds Opus 4.8 on coding/long-horizon agentic. Effort scale low|medium|high|xhigh|max; max = no token-spend cap.
claude.caveat: Fable 5 safety classifiers may auto-fallback to Opus 4.8 on security/biology content; persist max only via env CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL=max. Interactive Claude Code is flat-rate (not per-token metered).

codex.benchmark_basis: GPT-5.5 (2026-04-23) = OpenAI's newest frontier model and Codex CLI default; highest OpenAI model usable from Codex CLI. NOTE: no 'gpt-5.5-codex' variant exists — pass -m gpt-5.5. xhigh is the max reasoning tier.
codex.caveat: Verifier note: GPT-5.5 SWE-bench Verified ~82.6% (below Claude Opus 4.8 88.6% / Fable 5), but it is the best OpenAI model for the Codex lane. Watch for gpt-5.6 (rumored, no official id yet).

grok.benchmark_basis: Grok 4.3 (2026-04-30) = top of Grok line, Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index 53 (high). reasoning_effort defaults to low, so high MUST be set to maximize thinking.
grok.caveat: Model id uses a dot (grok-4.3, not grok-4-3). reasoning_effort CLI exposure varies by build; set via env (GROK_MODEL/GROK_REASONING_EFFORT) for the superagent build. Legacy grok-4/grok-4-0709 reject reasoning_effort.

antigravity.benchmark_basis: Gemini 3.1 Pro (2026-02-19) = Google's #1 model on aggregate (SWE-bench Verified 80.6%, ARC-AGI-2 77.1%, leads 13/16 benchmarks). thinkingLevel HIGH is both the max and the default for 3.1 Pro.
antigravity.caveat: Gemini CLI is deprecated 2026-06-18 — migrate to Antigravity CLI (agy), where the model picker label 'Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)' encodes max thinking (agy default is 'Gemini 3.5 Flash (High)', so override). Gemini 3.5 Flash beats 3.1 Pro on some agentic-coding benchmarks at lower cost (defensible alt).
